# Sondondo Copilot Instructions

- **Purpose**: Clean parish baptism/marriage/burial records, normalize fields, extract personas, then prepare for probabilistic linkage and network analysis.
- **Data lifecycle**: Raw CSVs live in data/raw/, cleaned outputs in data/clean/, intermediates in data/interim/, mappings in data/mappings/. Many helpers expect event-level files already harmonized.
- **Column harmonization**: project_code/utils/ColumnManager.py loads JSON mappings (e.g., data/mappings/bautismosMapping.json) to rename raw columns; use return_useful_columns() with data/mappings/usefulColumnsMapping.json to filter by event_type. Logs land in logs/column_manager.log.
- **Date normalization**: project_code/actions/normalizers/DatesNormalizer.py normalizes messy dates (Excel serials, missing day/month/year, inverted dates, "roto/ilegible" markers) to YYYY-MM-DD; SimpleNormalizer handles lighter cases (AgeInferrer uses it). Keep calendar logic intact when extending.
- **Name cleaning**: project_code/actions/normalizers/NamesNormalizer.py strips accents/titles, flips "Lastname, Name", removes sic/ilegible markers, and lowercases. Preferred entry point: clean_series().
- **Age → birthdate**: project_code/actions/generators/AgeInferrer.py parses Spanish age strings (años/meses/días, ranges, "del día", párvulo) into timedeltas and backs out birthdates from normalized event_date series. It first tries ISO strings in the age field.
- **Gender inference**: project_code/actions/generators/GenderInferrer.py wraps gender_guesser with token fallback and optional condition→gender mappings. simplify_gender() collapses mostly_* and andy.
- **Attribute harmonization**: project_code/actions/generators/InferCondition.py AttributeNormalizer loads mapping JSON (e.g., data/mappings/conditionMapping.json), applies exact/substring/fuzzy (rapidfuzz) matching for social_condition, legitimacy_status, marital_status, and can add _unmapped columns.
- **Persona extraction**: project_code/actions/extractors/Persona.py builds personas from harmonized event DataFrames. It detects role prefixes (baptized, deceased, father/mother, godparent, husband/wife, witness), assigns persona-{n} IDs, sets event_idno like bautismo-#, and preserves original_identifier from file+identifier. For matrimonios it splits embedded father_/mother_ fields into separate personas. It calls GenderInferrer and AttributeNormalizer, and standardizes birth/resident/death places with data/clean/unique_places.csv when present.
- **Place handling**: project_code/actions/extractors/placeRecognition.py provides PlaceExtractor (spaCy es_core_news_md LOC NER), MapPlaces/AuthoritativePlaceResolver using georesolver (WHG/GeoNames/TGN/Wikidata). Expect internet for resolution; map_places resolve_batch assumes columns place/country/place_type.
- **Utility modules**: project_code/utils/UniqueValues.py aggregates unique values across DataFrames; project_code/utils/StatsMethods.py offers cv, shannon_entropy, zipf_distribution, empirical_rank_freq; project_code/utils/LoggerHandler.py setup_logger writes class-specific logs into logs/.
- **Notebooks**: project_code/1_dataCleaning.ipynb → cleaned CSVs; 2_placeMapping.ipynb and 3_termExtraction.ipynb support mapping/NER; 4_personasCreation.ipynb builds personas; 5_visualizations.ipynb for EDA. Run in order if regenerating datasets.
- **Tests**: Pytest targets live in test/. Use PYTHONPATH=project_code pytest test/test_DateNormalizer.py etc. Some legacy tests import helpers.* modules that no longer exist; align imports to actions/* or skip as needed. Tests read real data from data/raw and write logs to logs/test_results/.
- **Mappings & schemas**: data/mappings/*.json drive column renames and attribute mappings; usefulColumnsMapping.json selects per-event columns; personas rely on event_type column set in harmonized data. Keep mapping keys lowercase to match code expectations.
- **Logging**: Most classes log to logs/<classname>.log; tests add per-test logs in logs/test_results/. Preserve logger setup when adding new processors.
- **External deps**: Requires spaCy model es_core_news_md (pinned in requirements.txt) and georesolver services; gender-guesser for gender inference; rapidfuzz for fuzzy mapping. Ensure these are installed before running tests/pipelines.
- **Data sensitivities**: Personas and mappings assume Spanish-language text and historical spelling variants; avoid stripping diacritics beyond existing cleaning rules unless justified.
- **Quick start**: Harmonize raw → clean: ColumnManager.harmonize_columns(raw_csv, mapping_json) → DateNormalizer.normalize() on date columns → NamesNormalizer.clean_series() → GenderInferrer/AgeInferrer/AttributeNormalizer → PersonaExtractor.extract_personas() to data/interim/personas_extracted.csv.
- **When extending**: Maintain deterministic outputs for reproducibility; update or add mapping JSONs alongside code changes; prefer adding tests that log into logs/test_results/ to mirror current patterns.
